assertions.text: Organisation name appears in full on first use with what it does clear in the first clause
At least one concrete scale indicator (date, size, geography, or volume) is present
No unsupported superlatives like world-leading or industry-leading
Headline states the news, not marketing spin
First paragraph contains who, what, when, where, and significance
Document ends with ### end mark and includes contact block
MEDIA ALERT label appears at the top of the document
WHAT, WHEN, WHERE, WHO, WHY fields are all present and filled
Total length does not exceed 250 words
